name: Wazuh Alert Jira Tickets - P1 P2 P3

nodes.name: Run Wazuh Alert Jira Tickets
nodes.notes: Creates Jira tickets for Wazuh alerts classified as P1/P2/P3. If AI_ENABLE_ANALYSIS=true, the script calls OpenAI/ChatGPT and embeds mitigation guidance in each ticket. Credentials and tuning live in integrations/n8n/.env.

nodes.name: Jira Ticket Links
nodes.notes: Collects direct Jira URLs returned by the alert ticket script.

parameters.content:
## Wazuh Alert Jira Tickets

1. Queries `wazuh-alerts-*`.
2. Selects alerts tagged `incident_priority_p1`, `incident_priority_p2`, or `incident_priority_p3`.
3. Groups duplicate alerts by rule, agent, IP/user/path.
4. If `AI_ENABLE_ANALYSIS=true`, sends Wazuh evidence to OpenAI/ChatGPT for mitigation guidance.
5. Creates one Jira ticket per grouped incident.
6. Ticket description includes Wazuh evidence plus `Analisis IA (ChatGPT)` when enabled.

Keep Jira/OpenAI credentials in `.env`, not in this workflow.
